title: moraea intermedia
intro: Moraea intermedia, also known as the "Intermediate Moraea" or "Yellow Pincushion", is a flowering plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. It is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Moraea intermedia can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for any health benefits.
